name: display-scripts
title: Display Scripts
description: Toggle between side-by-side and stacked MacBook + external monitor layouts in one keystroke.
author: Thomas

commands.name: toggle-arrangement
commands.title: Toggle Arrangement
commands.subtitle: Display Scripts
commands.description: Switch between side-by-side and stacked MacBook + external monitor layouts.

commands.name: configure-displays
commands.title: Configure Displays
commands.subtitle: Display Scripts
commands.description: Pick your displays from a list, identify them on-screen, and capture the two MacBook origin layouts.

preferences.name: displayplacerPath
preferences.title: Path to displayplacer
preferences.description: Absolute path to the `displayplacer` binary. Install with `brew install displayplacer`.
